phase: 16.3 — Tier 3 Queue Repair + Batch 9 Proof Execution

queue_logic_fix.fixed: Queue now supports Tier 3 calculator source from sitemap, not just blog impression pages
changes: Added build_tier3_candidates() — extracts T3 calculators from sitemap, excludes T1/T2, excludes already-submitted
Added --source CLI flag for source selection
Added --limit CLI flag for batch size

bugs_fixed: load_run_log() now migrates old 'results' format to 'runs' format
Added isinstance check for dict entries to skip integer count fields

batch9_execution.result: All 10 T3 calculators are already in Google's index. The 'Request Indexing' button was not available because Google already has them indexed.
batch9_execution.conclusion: T3 calculators ARE being discovered by Google via sitemap. They're indexed but not ranking for competitive terms due to domain authority (0 backlinks). GSC UI Request Indexing is unnecessary for already-indexed pages — it only helps for newly discovered pages.

what_this_phase_fixed: ✅ Queue now supports Tier 3 calculator source (not just blog pages)
✅ Batch 9 executed via direct terminal (not subagent)
✅ 10 T3 calculators confirmed in Google's index
✅ Phase 15 daily rule updated to use --source tier3
✅ Proof ledger updated with Batch 9 results
✅ 2 follow-ups sent, 3 prospects ready for Jun 7
biggest_insight: T3 calculators ARE indexed by Google. The problem is NOT indexing — it's ranking. Google has discovered and indexed the pages via sitemap but doesn't rank them because the domain has 0 backlinks and is 34 days old. GSC UI 'Request Indexing' helps for newly published pages, not for pages already in the index.
